web.title: Hidden/Advanced Preferences

web.markdown:
Guides

# Hidden/Advanced Preferences

A list of useful flags in Zen Browser's Advanced Preferences page (about:config).

These are a variety of settings that can change Zen's appearance, behavior, and more. To access them, go to `about:config` in Zen Browser, and search for the title of the flag. Some of these flags may require a restart to work.

### [Appearance](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#appearance)

#### [`zen.theme.content-element-separation`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenthemecontent-element-separation)

Changes the size of the border around the browser window. 8 by default.

#### [`zen.theme.accent-color`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenthemeaccent-color)

The color hex value of Zen's main accent color.

#### [`zen.theme.essentials-favicon-bg`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenthemeessentials-favicon-bg)

Enables a colorful icon for when an essential tab is selected, based on the website's favicon. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.theme.gradient`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenthemegradient)

Allows setting custom sidebar colors. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.theme.gradient.show-custom-colors`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenthemegradientshow-custom-colors)

Allows setting a color hex as your sidebar color. Disabled by default.

#### [`zen.view.experimental-rounded-view`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewexperimental-rounded-view)

??? Disabled by default.

#### [`zen.view.grey-out-inactive-windows`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewgrey-out-inactive-windows)

If a window is inactive, the theme color fades to gray. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.watermark.enabled`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenwatermarkenabled)

Shows a splash screen briefly when Zen is opened. Enabled by default.

### [Transparency & Blur](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#transparency--blur)

#### [`zen.theme.acrylic-elements`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenthemeacrylic-elements)

Windows-specific. Allows use of Windows' Acrylic protocol for a blur effect in Zen. Enabled by default on Windows.

#### [`zen.widget.linux.transparency`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenwidgetlinuxtransparency)

Linux-specific. Makes the browser UI transparent.

#### [`browser.tabs.allow_transparent_browser`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#browsertabsallow_transparent_browser)

Changes the default website background to your theme color. Disabled by default.

Enabling could break the way certain websites look.

### [Tabs](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#tabs)

#### [`zen.tab-unloader.excluded-urls`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zentab-unloaderexcluded-urls)

A comma-separated list of URLs exempt from being unloaded.

#### [`zen.tabs.dim-pending`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zentabsdim-pending)

Dims unloaded tabs. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.tabs.rename-tabs`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zentabsrename-tabs)

Allows renaming pinned tabs. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.ctrlTab.show-pending-tabs`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenctrltabshow-pending-tabs)

Allow switching to unloaded tabs using Ctrl+Tab, when "Ctrl+Tab cycles through tabs in recently used order" is enabled. Disabled by default.

#### [`zen.startup.smooth-scroll-in-tabs`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenstartupsmooth-scroll-in-tabs)

Turns on smooth scrolling when scrolling through tabs. Enabled by default.

#### [`toolkit.tabbox.switchByScrolling`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#toolkittabboxswitchbyscrolling)

Allows to switch tabs by scrolling when hovering over tabs. Disabled by default.

### [New Tabs](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#new-tabs)

#### [`zen.urlbar.replace-newtab`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenurlbarreplace-newtab)

Replaces opening a new tab, with instead showing the URL bar and allowing you to input a query which will then open a new tab. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.workspaces.open-new-tab-if-last-unpinned-tab-is-closed`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenworkspacesopen-new-tab-if-last-unpinned-tab-is-closed)

Opens a new tab when all pinned tabs are unloaded, and all tabs are closed. Disabled by default.

### [URL Bar](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#url-bar)

#### [`zen.urlbar.hide-one-offs`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenurlbarhide-one-offs)

Hides the alternative search engines from appearing in the URL bar. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.urlbar.show-domain-only-in-sidebar`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenurlbarshow-domain-only-in-sidebar)

When Single Toolbar is enabled, shows only the website domain(ex: example.com) instead of the full URL(ex: example.com/page). Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.urlbar.show-protections-icon`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenurlbarshow-protections-icon)

Shows the "protections" icon in the URL bar, which details security information about the current website. Disabled by default.

#### [`zen.urlbar.wait-to-clear`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenurlbarwait-to-clear)

How long the URL bar saves what you typed, if you typed something in and unfocused it in milliseconds. 45000 by default.

#### [`zen.view.sidebar-collapsed.hide-mute-button`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewsidebar-collapsedhide-mute-button)

Hides the mute button in Collapsed Toolbar mode.

#### [`zen.view.sidebar-expanded.max-width`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewsidebar-expandedmax-width)

Controls the width of the sidebar in Single Toolbar or Multiple Toolbars mode.

#### [`zen.view.sidebar-height-throttle`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewsidebar-height-throttle)

??? 200 by default.

### [Window Controls](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#window-controls)

#### [`zen.view.hide-window-controls`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewhide-window-controls)

Hides the window controls. Enabled by default.

In Single Toolbar mode, this hides the toolbar, which can then be revealed on hover.

#### [`zen.view.experimental-force-window-controls-left`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewexperimental-force-window-controls-left)

Forces the window controls to appear on the left side of the window. Disabled by default.

If the sidebar is in the left side, it will appear in it.

#### [`zen.view.experimental-no-window-controls`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewexperimental-no-window-controls)

Removes the window controls entirely. Disabled by default.

This will disable the toolbar in Single Toolbar mode.

### [Workspaces](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#workspaces)

#### [`zen.workspaces.swipe-actions`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenworkspacesswipe-actions)

Allows swiping with the trackpad on the sidebar to switch workspaces. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.workspaces.wrap-around-navigation`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenworkspaceswrap-around-navigation)

When swiping through tabs, allow going to the last workspace from the first workspace by swiping left, or vice versa. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.workspaces.natural-scroll`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenworkspacesnatural-scroll)

Turns on natural scrolling for swiping through workspaces. Disabled by default.

#### [`zen.workspaces.scroll-modifier-key`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenworkspacesscroll-modifier-key)

Controls the hotkey that enables hovering over the sidebar and switching workspaces by scrolling. Options are 'ctrl', 'alt', 'shift'. Default is 'ctrl'.

### [Compact mode](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#compact-mode)

#### [`zen.view.compact.animate-sidebar`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewcompactanimate-sidebar)

Animates the webpage moving in/out when compact mode is enabled/disabled. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.view.compact.color-sidebar`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewcompactcolor-sidebar)

Colors the sidebar with your custom theme color during compact mode. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.view.compact.color-toolbar`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewcompactcolor-toolbar)

Colors the toolbar with your custom theme color during compact mode. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.view.show-background-tab-toast`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewshow-background-tab-toast)

Shows a toast when a tab is open while compact mode is enabled. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.view.compact.show-sidebar-and-toolbar-on-hover`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewcompactshow-sidebar-and-toolbar-on-hover)

Shows the sidebar/toolbar if you hover in their general area during compact mode. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.view.compact.toolbar-flash-popup`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewcompacttoolbar-flash-popup)

Shows the sidebar for a moment when opening a new tab during compact mode. Disabled by default.

`zen.view.compact.toolbar-flash-popup.duration` controls the duration in milliseconds. 800 by default.

#### [`zen.view.compact.toolbar-hide-after-hover.duration`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenviewcompacttoolbar-hide-after-hoverduration)

Controls the duration until which the toolbar/sidebar hides after you stopped hovering over it in compact mode. 1000 by default.

### [Split View](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#split-view)

#### [`zen.splitView.enable-tab-drop`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zensplitviewenable-tab-drop)

When enabled, dropping a tab from the sidebar to the current webpage starts split view. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.splitView.min-resize-width`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zensplitviewmin-resize-width)

The minimum width or height of any split view tab. The number represents the percentage of the screen taken up by the tab. 7 by default.

#### [`zen.splitView.rearrange-hover-size`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zensplitviewrearrange-hover-size)

??? 24 by default.

### [Media](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#media)

#### [`zen.mediacontrols.enabled`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenmediacontrolsenabled)

Shows a media player interface if audio is playing in another tab, or a conference call interface if you're in a conference call. Enabled by default.

#### [`media.videocontrols.picture-in-picture.enabled`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#mediavideocontrolspicture-in-pictureenabled)

Allows picture-in-picture. Enabled by default.

#### [`media.videocontrols.picture-in-picture.enable-when-switching-tabs.enabled`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#mediavideocontrolspicture-in-pictureenable-when-switching-tabsenabled)

Automatically turns on picture-in-picture when switching tabs during video playback. Disabled by default.

### [Other](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#other)

#### [`zen.glance.enable-contextmenu-search`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenglanceenable-contextmenu-search)

Controls whether Glance will open when performing a search or using the context menu (such as right-click search). Enabled by default.

If disabled, Glance will not open for context menu or search-triggered actions, even if Glance is enabled elsewhere.

#### [`zen.keyboard.shortcuts.enabled`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenkeyboardshortcutsenabled)

Allows changing keyboard shortcuts. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.glance.open-essential-external-links`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenglanceopen-essential-external-links)

When enabled, external links that are opened inside an essential tab will open in Glance. Enabled by default.

#### [`browser.toolbars.bookmarks.visibility`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#browsertoolbarsbookmarksvisibility)

Controls when the bookmarks toolbar is shown. Options are 'always', 'newtab', 'never'. Default is 'never'.

#### [`zen.downloads.download-animation`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zendownloadsdownload-animation)

When enabled, plays an animation when a download begins. Enabled by default.

`zen.downloads.download-animation-duration` controls the duration in milliseconds. 1000 by default.

#### [`zen.haptic-feedback.enabled`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenhaptic-feedbackenabled)

macOS-specific. Triggers haptic feedback on the trackpad's vibration motor when you drag tabs around, or change the texture in the Change Theme Colors pop-up. Enabled by default.

#### [`zen.browser.is-cool`](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/about-config-flags\#zenbrowseris-cool)

This is true.

How to integrate 1Password Desktop App with Zen Browser](https://docs.zen-browser.app/guides/1password) [Optimized builds\\

## Description

[![@Lampe2020](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/94976382?u=e8a5d761b75e8941c01c810ceffdff1bf84660b7&v=4&size=48)](https://github.com/Lampe2020)

[Lampe2020](https://github.com/Lampe2020)

opened [on Jul 11, 2025on Jul 11, 2025](https://github.com/zen-browser/desktop/issues/9418#issue-3224294629)

Last edited by Lampe2020

Issue body actions

### Preliminary Checks

- I have read and understood the important section above.































I have searched existing issues and avoided creating duplicates.































I am not filing an enhancement request.































I have checked that this issue cannot be reproduced on Mozilla Firefox.































I have checked that this issue can be reproduced once I removed all my Mods and Custom CSS.




















To pick up a draggable item, press the space bar.
While dragging, use the arrow keys to move the item.
Press space again to drop the item in its new position, or press escape to cancel.



### What happened?

I set my theme colour to `darkgreen` using the by-default-hidden "Custom colour" entry in the theme editor. All popups and context menus turned transparent.

### Expected behavior

Popups and context menus have a background colour that is either unchangeable or fits the theme

### Actual behavior

Popups and context menus turn transparent

### Steps to reproduce

1. Open the theme editor as prompted on the "What's new?" page
2. Enter a non-hex CSS colour into the "Custom colour" text field (needs to be unhidden by enabling the `zen.theme.gradient.show-custom-colors` option in `about:config`)

### Screenshots and videos

![Screenshot of both a popup and context menu being transparent](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/94976382/465490398-ac95f19e-5a99-4e58-961f-311946de9ec3.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1yD4Qg3YEzPBYDLlUIV5rjZu1_P-qXAVn9blYXyiWnI) _Note that I'm hovering with my mouse on the "Klistra in" in the context menu, that's why it has a background._

\[EDIT\]: Note that only the top colour being non-hexadecimal breaks, if the top colour is hexadecimal all other colours work flawlessly and nothing turns unexpectedly transparent.

Here's a video to demonstrate that: [https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8e837329-f3fd-4fa3-876e-c273d108d9db](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8e837329-f3fd-4fa3-876e-c273d108d9db)

### Version

1.14.4b

### What platform are you seeing the problem on?

Linux (Tarball)

### What component is this issue related to?

Customizable UI / Toolbars

### Relevant log output if applicable

```

```

More actions

Hi, [@Lampe2020](https://github.com/Lampe2020). I'm [Dosu](https://dosu.dev/), and I'm helping the desktop team manage their backlog and am marking this issue as stale.

**Issue Summary:**

- You reported that in version 1.14.4b on Linux, using a non-hex CSS color like "darkgreen" as the top custom color in the theme editor causes popups and context menus to become transparent.
- The issue does not occur when using hexadecimal color values.
- The problem persists even after disabling all mods and custom CSS.
- It appears related to the customizable UI/toolbars component.
- There has been no further activity or comments on this issue.

**Next Steps:**

- Please let me know if this issue is still relevant with the latest version of the desktop repository by commenting here to keep the discussion open.
- Otherwise, I will automatically close this issue in 7 days.

Thank you for your understanding and contribution!

web.markdown:
![Thumbnail (1920x1080)](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/vzeqC43GJrI/maxresdefault.jpg)
# [How to Customize Zen Browser for the Ultimate Experience!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vzeqC43GJrI)

**Visibility**: Public
**Uploaded by**: [SamCux](https://www.youtube.com/@samcux)
**Uploaded at**: 2025-02-20
**Published at**: 
**Length**: 08:20
**Views**: 68434
**Likes**: 624
**Category**: Education

## Description

```
Want to elevate your browsing experience? Learn how to customize Zen Browser for the ultimate experience! In this video, I’ll walk you through the best Zen Browser mods, themes, and settings to transform your browser into a sleek, high-performance tool. Whether you’re using Windows, Mac, or Linux, these customizations will enhance speed, aesthetics, and functionality—giving you a faster, smoother, and more visually stunning browsing experience.

 Enhance your browser’s look with the best themes and visual tweaks
 Boost functionality with powerful Zen Browser extensions
 Optimize settings for peak performance and efficiency
 Unlock hidden features you didn’t know existed

 If you’re ready to upgrade your browser, don’t miss this guide! LIKE this video if you found it helpful and SUBSCRIBE for more tech tips!

 Download Links:
 Zen Browser: https://zen-browser.app/
 Mica For Everyone: https://github.com/MicaForEveryone/MicaForEveryone

 Text Commands:
about:config
browser.tabs.allow_transparent_browser

Music Used:
Music track: Sunset by Lukrembo
Music track: honey jam by massobeats
Music track: Sweet Talks by Limujii
Source: https://freetouse.com/music
No Copyright Music (Free Download)

 SEO Tags:
zen browser, how to customize zen browser, zen browser mods, best zen browser mods, zen browser customization, zen browser themes, zen browser tutorial, zen browser review, zen browser settings, best browser for mac, best browser for windows, zen browser download, zen browser extensions, zen browser mac, zen browser windows, zen browser linux, zen browser update, zen browser UI, fast browser, chrome alternative, lightweight browser, tech hacks, arc browser, custom browser, new browser 2025, improve browser performance, best internet browser, browser optimization, tweak zen browser, zen browser dark mode, best browser extensions, zen browser speed, make zen browser faster

 Hashtags:
#ZenBrowser #BrowserCustomization #BestZenMods #ZenBrowserThemes #TechHacks #BrowsingTips #ZenBrowserTutorial #BrowserUpgrade #WebCustomization #TechTips
```
